headline: 2 S&P 500 Stocks to Target This Week and 1 We Avoid
summary: While the S&P 500 (^GSPC) includes industry leaders, not every stock in the index is a winner. Some companies are past their prime, weighed down by poor execution, weak financials, or structural headwinds.

headline: Wells Fargo Raises Target Price for Airbnb (ABNB)
summary: Airbnb Inc. (NASDAQ:ABNB) is one of the 7 best PropTech stocks to buy according to hedge funds. On April 1, Wells Fargo increased its price target on Airbnb Inc. (NASDAQ:ABNB) from $133 to $136 while maintaining an Equal Weight rating on the stock. This results in almost 9% upside potential at the prevailing level. Despite […]
